title: Election Campaigns Intensify Across Dharmapuri
summary: Political parties have intensified their campaign efforts across Dharmapuri district with rallies, public meetings, and grassroots outreach. Leaders are focusing on rural voters and local development issues ahead of the upcoming elections.

summary: Dharmapuri has become a crucial battleground with major political parties deploying senior leaders and strategies to secure voter support in the district.
